text: Reaction: After you win a [conflict-military] conflict with more participating characters than your opponent, bow this stronghold and sacrifice a (friendly) Cavalry character – you may declare an additional [conflict-military] conflict this phase.
name: Hisu Mori Toride

text: Action: Choose an honored character – ready that character.
name: Magistrate Station

text: X is equal to twice the bid on your honor dial.
name: Web of Lies

text: While this character is participating in a conflict, each character you control gains courtesy and sincerity.
name: Yasuki Broker

text: Covert. Reaction: After this character chooses a character using covert – that character cannot be declared as an attacker this phase.
name: Tengu Sensei

text: Action: During a conflict, return 1 or more rings you have claimed to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a character you control – search your conflict deck for an attachment with printed cost equal to or lower than the number of rings returned and attach it to that character. Shuffle.
name: Agasha Shunsen

text:
For each [conflict-military] ring that is claimed, this character gets +2[conflict-military].
For each [conflict-political] ring that is claimed, this character gets +2[conflict-political].
name: Kitsu Warrior

text: This character gets +3[conflict-political] while you have claimed the [element-air] or [element-void] ring.
name: Reader of Omens

text: During [element-earth] conflicts, this character gains covert and is immune to enemy card effects.
name: Reclusive Zokujin

text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict in which you have more participating characters than your opponent – gain 1 fate and draw 1 card.
name: Minami Kaze Regulars

text: Water role only. Interrupt: When you play an event, lose 1 honor – reduce the cost of that event by 1.
name: Mantis Tenkinja

text: Void role only. You may use the fate on a ring to pay the cost of a conflict card that has a Trait that matches an element of that ring.
name: Awakened Tsukumogami

text:
Attach to a character you control.
While you are less honorable than an opponent, attached character gets +1[conflict-military], +1[conflict-political], and gains: "This character cannot be honored or dishonored."
name: Pragmatism

text: Earth role only. Action: During a conflict, if the attacked province has an element that matches the contested ring or a ring in your claimed ring pool – double that province's strength until the end of the conflict.
name: Specialized Defenses

text: Void role only. Attach to a character you control. Action: Bow attached character, choose an unclaimed ring – move each fate from that ring to attached character.
name: Being and Becoming

text: Reaction: After an opponent declares an [element-earth] conflict, choose a Monk character or a character with a Monk attachment – until the end of the conflict, opponents’ card abilities cannot choose that character as a target. Draw 1 card. Errata from RRG v1.7
name: Mantra of Earth

text: Water role only. Restricted. Interrupt: When you would resolve the [element-water] ring effect, choose a character you control – instead of resolving normal ring effects, put this attachment into play from your hand or conflict discard pile, attached to that character.
name: Restored Heirloom

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – take a ring from the defending player's claimed ring pool.
name: Roving Michibiku

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a Shugenja character you control and a Shugenja character controlled by an opponent – your character challenges your opponent's character to a glory duel. The winner of the duel's controller resolves a ring effect of his or her choice as if he or she was the attacking player.
name: Taryū-Jiai

text: Fire role only. Action: During a conflict, lose 3 honor – set the [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill of each participating character to 3 until the end of the conflict.
name: Unleash the Djinn
